kernelToOperatorIdentityInputStatus.label: kernel-to-operator identity input
kernelToOperatorIdentityInputStatus.reason: The imported identity theorem converts original Weyl kernel positivity into positive Weyl operators.

weylOperatorFamilyStatus.label: positive Weyl operator family
weylOperatorFamilyStatus.reason: In the same Weyl normalization, positivity of the coordinate kernel quadratic form is the statement that Op^W(sigma_omega) is positive semidefinite for every |omega|<1/2.

proof: Import original coordinate Weyl kernel positivity for every |omega|<1/2.
Import the kernel-to-operator identity in the fixed hbar=1 Weyl convention.
Expose only this Weyl positive-operator family to the KLM packaging theorem.
notClaimedHere: This theorem does not prove KLM positive type.  It only supplies the positive Weyl operator family consumed by the hbar=1 KLM/Weyl equivalence layer.
